title: Oracle For Separating Local Lecture Two Proof From Cited-Source Fusion Gap
summary: Detailed oracle for the Lecture Two honesty question about local proof coverage versus the narrower residual enrichment route.
assumptions: The answer should separate local derivation coverage from the remaining enrichment route cleanly.
scope: Detailed answer key for the Lecture Two proof-versus-fusion honesty question.

source_anchors.notes: The local reusable proof spine is in the current KB.
The original source is present through the traced-curvature and projector fragments, while denser archival mapping remains follow-up work.

derivation_spine: State that the Witten-side local proof obligations are explicit and reusable.
State that the TKNN core route is already source-grade locally through the traced-curvature identity and the projector formula.
Name the actual remaining enrichment route: denser archival mapping and the Haldane lattice-realization bridge.
mandatory_logical_moves: Separate core theorem coverage from the narrower residual enrichment route.
Name the actual open gap and follow-up task.
common_failure_patterns: Claiming the family is still missing a core TKNN source-grade fragment.
Treating the projector formula as present while ignoring the local traced-curvature bridge that now supports it.
Claiming the family is fully exhausted and has no remaining Haldane or archival follow-up.
grading_rubric: Pass requires a clean distinction between core source-grade coverage and the remaining enrichment route.
failure_triggers: Fail if the answer says TKNN/Haldane are already fully exhausted when the designated follow-up route still remains.
Fail if the answer cannot identify any current local proof coverage.
